Hints.Name: The name of the customer role.
Hints.SystemName: The system name of the customer role.
Hints.Active: Check to make this role active.

UniqueSeoCode.Length: Two letter SEO code should be 2 characters long.

Hints.Name: The name of the language.
Hints.FlagImageFileName: The flag image file name. The image should be saved into \images\flags\ directory.
Hints.UniqueSeoCode: The unique two letter SEO code. It's used to generate URLs like 'http://www.yourStore.com/en/' when you have more than one published language.
Hints.Published: Determines whether this language is published and can therefore be selected by visitors.
Hints.DisplayOrder: The display order of this language. 1 represents the top of the list.
Hints.DefaultCurrencyId: This property allows a store owner to specify a default currency for a language. If not specified, then the default currency display order will be used.

Name.Length: Name must be less than or equal to 50 characters.

CurrencyCode.Length: Currency code must be less than or equal to 5 characters.

Validation.Rate: Exchange rate must be greater than 0.
Validation.CustomFormatting: Custom formatting must be less than or equal to 50 characters.

Hints.Name: The name of the currency.
Hints.CreatedOnUtc: The date/time the currency was created.

Errors.ExistOnTrader: Import department that all ready exists on Trader.

Hints.Email: This is the from address for all outgoing emails from your store e.g. 'info@yourstore.com'.
Hints.DisplayName: This is the friendly display name for outgoing emails from your store e.g. 'Your Store Sales Department'.
Hints.Host: This is the host name or IP address of your mail server. You can normally find this out from your ISP or web host.
Hints.Port: This is the SMTP port of your mail server. This is usually port 25.
Hints.UserName: This is the username you use to authenticate to your mail server.
Hints.Password: This is the password you use to authenticate to your mail server.
Hints.EnableSsl: Check to use Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) to encrypt the SMTP connection.
Hints.UseDefaultCredentials: Check to use default credentials for the connection.
Hints.SendTestEmailTo: Send test email to ensure that everything is properly configured.
